# PlaygroundBluetoothConnectionView.Item.FirmwareStatus.outOfDate

**Enumeration Case**

The state that indicates that a peripheral needs a firmware update before it can operate correctly.

## Declaration

```swift
case outOfDate
```

## Determining Firmware Status

- **PlaygroundBluetoothConnectionView.Item.FirmwareStatus.upToDate**: The state that indicates that a peripheral doesn’t need a firmware update.
- **!=(_:_:)**: Compares two firmware statuses and returns [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/swift/true] when they're different.

items.description: The state that indicates that a peripheral doesn’t need a firmware update.
